sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_ngram (input_string String, min_hash UInt64, max_hash UInt64);
INSERT INTO test_ngram (input_string, min_hash, max_hash) VALUES ('TestString', 0, 0);
UPDATE test_ngram SET min_hash = ngramMinHashCaseInsensitive(input_string).1, max_hash = ngramMinHashCaseInsensitive(input_string).2 WHERE input_string = 'TestString';
SELECT input_string, ngramMinHashCaseInsensitive(input_string) AS hashes FROM test_ngram;
INSERT INTO test_ngram (input_string, min_hash, max_hash) VALUES ('AnotherExample', ngramMinHashCaseInsensitive('AnotherExample').1, ngramMinHashCaseInsensitive('AnotherExample').2);
